inputs.label: Air Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Dry-bulb air temperature in degrees Celsius

inputs.label: Magnus Constant a
inputs.businessContext: Empirical constant a for Magnus formula (17.27 for water, 21.875 for ice)

inputs.label: Magnus Constant b
inputs.businessContext: Empirical constant b (237.7 °C for water, 265.5 °C for ice)

formulas.dewPoint: (b * ((a * temperature) / (b + temperature) + Math.log(humidity / 100))) / (a - ((a * temperature) / (b + temperature) + Math.log(humidity / 100)))
